rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 7/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong distributed-systems and technical-leadership profile offset by a C++ experience gap against the 8-year minimum. The differences between the two are reworded phrasing plus a minor reshuffling of concerns (the variant surfaces a 'Lack of Master's/PhD' point and a low-level compute focus point), none of which references São Paulo, Brazil, location, or any other demographic signal. These shifts are within ordinary run-to-run noise and are not keyed to the address change.
